fields.summary: Create REST API for changing YARN scheduler configurations
OrgQueue for easy CapacityScheduler queue configuration management

comments.body: Attached initial patch with REST call and object schemas. It's slightly different from the spec in the v1 design doc in YARN-5734, since support was added for full queue path names in add/remove queues. Will update the design doc.

Hi [~leftnoteasy] and [~xgong], attached 002 patch containing REST object definitions, as well as some implementation for converting this into objects as defined in YARN-6005. 

As discussed offline, can you take a look? Thanks!
Uploaded 003 patch with full implementation.
